hero.title: Good food brings the room together.
hero.description: Warm, beautifully organised catering for weddings, work, parties and cultural celebrations—planned around your people.
hero.imageAlt: Elegant daylight wedding table prepared by a professional caterer

products.title: Catering shaped to the gathering
products.description: Different events need different rhythms. We build the food and service around yours.

items.name: Wedding feasts
items.description: Relaxed sharing menus, plated dinners and evening food with full service.
items.imageAlt: Beautiful wedding reception table with catered food

items.name: Work & launches
items.description: Breakfasts, lunches, canapés and brand events that run precisely.

items.name: Private celebrations
items.description: Generous buffets and hosted dinners for birthdays and family occasions.
items.imageAlt: Catered private event with guests and plated food

feature.note: Food with a point of view
feature.title: Seasonal menus, built around your guests.
feature.description: We combine modern British produce with influences from the families and communities we cook for. Dietary needs are part of the plan—not an afterthought.
feature.imageAlt: Caterer finishing a bright seasonal buffet with refined canapés

packages.title: Useful places to begin
packages.description: Choose a service style, then we tailor the dishes, staffing and timings to your event.

items.name: Gathering table
items.description: Abundant seasonal sharing dishes for a relaxed lunch or dinner.

items.name: Wedding day
items.description: A complete food journey from welcome drink to late-night bite.

items.name: Canapé reception
items.description: Elegant bite-sized food with attentive roaming service.

gallery.title: Events in full colour
gallery.description: Long tables, busy passes, intimate rooms and generous platters across Yorkshire.

rowTwo.imageAlt: Tables set for an intimate dinner
rowTwo.caption: An intimate room

rowTwo.imageAlt: Caterer at an elegant celebration table
rowTwo.caption: Before the doors open

story.title: A calm team behind a brilliant day.
story.description: Our planners and chefs work as one team from first call to final clear-down. You get one clear plan, honest advice and people who know how events really move.
story.imageAlt: Professional catering team serving guests at a private event
story.quote: The food should feel effortless to your guests—even when the plan behind it is exact.

process.title: Planning without the noise
process.description: Four clear stages keep menus, logistics and people moving together.

steps.title: Share the brief
steps.description: Tell us the occasion, location, guests, budget and priorities.

steps.title: Shape the menu
steps.description: We propose service style, dishes, dietary choices and staffing.

steps.title: Taste & refine
steps.description: Wedding and large-event clients taste, review and approve.

steps.title: Host with ease
steps.description: Our team cooks, serves, coordinates and clears down quietly.

testimonials.title: Trusted with the important days
testimonials.description: Feedback from couples, producers, offices and hosts.

items.quote: The team made 140 guests feel individually looked after. The food was exceptional.
items.name: Maya & Tom

items.quote: Precise timings, thoughtful dietary options and not one moment of stress.
items.name: Jo H.

items.quote: Our family menu felt personal and generous, not like standard event food.
items.name: Adaeze N.

visit.title: Tell us what's gathering.
visit.description: Send the date, venue, guest count and rough style. We reply with availability and sensible next steps.

footer.note: Thoughtful catering for gatherings across Yorkshire.
